mapper.select: SELECT A.USERID , A.CNTR_MOBILE_NO , A.SVC_CNTR_NO , B.SOC , C.RATE_NM , C.RATE_CD , C.DATA_TYPE FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG A ,MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO@DL_MSP B ,MSP_RATE_MST@DL_MSP C WHERE A.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{contractNum} AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = A.SVC_CNTR_NO AND B.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND B.EXPIRATION_DATE > TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND B.SOC = C.RATE_CD
